summary: This document is a pitch deck outlining KeepMeCompany's AI-powered phone agent solution for UK GP practices. It details the problem of GP capacity decline, the proposed technical solution for symptom gathering and EHR integration, and projected financial savings for the NHS. The deck concludes with the business model based on savings sharing and introduces the founding team.
